testimonials.headline: Loved by
testimonials.description: See what our users are saying about BrandKit

1.content: BrandKit saved me hours of work. I used to spend half a day creating assets for each project. Now it takes 60 seconds.
1.author: Jake Thompson

2.content: The AI-generated headlines are surprisingly good. They capture our brand voice perfectly every time.
2.author: Sarah Chen

3.content: Finally, a tool that understands brand consistency. The color palette management is exactly what I needed.
3.author: Mike Rodriguez

4.content: We use BrandKit for all our client projects. The ROI is incredible - it pays for itself in the first project.
4.author: Anna Kim

faq.headline: Frequently asked
faq.description: Everything you need to know about BrandKit

1.question: What assets does BrandKit generate?
1.answer: BrandKit generates over 12 types of brand assets including OG images, favicons, app icons (iOS & Android), Apple Touch icons, Twitter cards, and more. All assets are optimized for their respective platforms and delivered in a single ZIP file.

2.question: Can I use the generated assets commercially?
2.answer: Yes! All assets generated with BrandKit are yours to use commercially. There are no usage restrictions - use them for your products, client projects, or any commercial purpose.

3.question: How does the AI headline generation work?
3.answer: Our AI analyzes your brand profile, including keywords, style direction, and industry context, to generate SEO-optimized headlines, taglines, and descriptions that match your brand voice.

4.question: What's the difference between Free and Pro plans?
4.answer: The Free plan includes 3 projects/month, 2 brand profiles, and basic features. Pro unlocks unlimited projects, 5 brand profiles, AI icon generation, all style presets, and priority support.

5.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
5.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access to Pro features until the end of your billing period. No questions asked.

6.question: Do you offer refunds?
6.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with BrandKit Pro, contact us within 14 days of purchase for a full refund.

faq.contactDescription: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.
